# FolderArchive

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FolderArchive icon">

aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FolderArchive;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FolderArchive { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
archive, zip, package

files
